prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次依次约17037→15582→14586→13036→14254，整体呈波动中前移趋势，2024年达到近年最低13036名后2025年小幅后移至14254 名，近5年位次中枢约14899名；该校在云南理科（物理类）招生计划2021年25人、2022年27人、2023年25人、2024年27人、2025年36人，2026年进一步扩 至41人，较2025年增加5人（扩招约13.9%），扩招幅度较大，对位次有推后效应。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国矿业大学（北京）为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026 年第76名，近年排名稳定在76–77名区间，属于中上游211院校；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及学校管理回应（军训参与人数提升、校园安全意识提升 ），无重大负面舆情；抖音热度未进入总排名前106，曝光度一般；历史投档异常记录中该校未出现断档信号；该校以矿业、安全为特色，安全科学与工程为A+ 学科（第五轮评估），对应招生专业安全科学与工程类。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 安全科学与工程类对应安全工程等专业社会需求稳定；机械类、土木工程等传统工科专业热度分化，土木建筑类整体呈明显劝退趋势；工商管理类社会热度分化观 望；本省2026年普通高考总人数377900，较2025年（历史类+物理类合计285688）大幅增加约32%，物理类估算约22.9万人，竞争显著加剧；该校位于北京，对西南地区考生有一定地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次14254名、2026年扩招13.9%、本省考生大幅增加约32%使竞争加剧，以及学校声誉平稳、专业热度分化等因素，预测2026年最低位次约15492名，区间14992–15992名。扩招与考生增加两 因素均指向位次后移，但扩招幅度较大部分对冲了考生增加的影响。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间14992–15992名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报，一档专业可冲刺（人工智能、数学类等热门方向），三档专业作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<14992名）可 重点冲刺一档专业；位次接近区间上限（>15992名）建议以三档保底为主。该校安全科学与工程类（A+学科对应）虽列二档但学科实力突出，值得重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 17037 → 15582 → 14586 → 13036 → 14254, showing a fluctuating forward trend overall. In 2024, it reached a recent low of 13036, then slightly moved back to 14254 in 2025. The median ranking over the past 5 years is about 14899. The enrollment plan for this university in Yunnan for science (physics category) was 25 in 2021, 27 in 2022, 25 in 2023, 27 in 2024, and 36 in 2025. In 2026, it further expands to 41, an increase of 5 students (about 13.9% expansion) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and has a pushing-back effect on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Mining and Technology (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 76th, with a stable ranking in the 76–77 range in recent years, placing it among mid-to-upper tier 211 institutions. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management responses (increased participation in military training, enhanced campus safety awareness), with no major negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity did not enter the top 106 overall rankings, indicating average exposure. There are no signs of admission anomalies in historical records. The university is characterized by mining and safety, with Safety Science and Engineering being an A+ discipline (fifth round evaluation), corresponding to the Safety Science and Engineering major category.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Safety Science and Engineering category, corresponding to majors like Safety Engineering, has stable social demand. Traditional engineering majors such as Mechanical and Civil Engineering show diverging popularity, with the civil construction category overall showing a clear trend of discouragement. The Business Administration category shows diverging social popularity and is under observation. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the general college entrance examination in this province is 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (history category + physics category total 285,688). The estimated number of physics category candidates is about 229,000, indicating sharply intensified competition. The university is located in Beijing, which has some regional appeal to candidates from the southwestern region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 14254, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 13.9%, the significant increase of about 32% in provincial candidates intensifying competition, stable university reputation, and diverging major popularity, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is approximately 15492, with a range of 14992–15992. Both the expansion and the increase in candidates point to a backward shift in rankings, but the relatively large expansion partially offsets the impact of the candidate increase.

- New Energy Science and Engineering

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 14992–15992, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a reach (such as Artificial Intelligence, Mathematics Category, etc.), and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<14992), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors. If your ranking is close to the upper bound (>15992), it is advisable to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety. Although the Safety Science and Engineering category (corresponding to A+ discipline) is listed in Tier 2, its strong disciplinary strength makes it worth special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 2288 → 2148 → 5846 → 2679 → 3286. In 2023, an abnormally high ranking of 5846 occurred (possibly due to that year). Excluding outliers, the recent ranking center is about 2600–3300, with a 2025 baseline of approximately 3286. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Yunnan was 4 in 2021, 4 in 2022, 6 in 2023, 8 in 2024, and 6 in 2025. It remains at 6 in 2026, unchanged from 2025, with no direct impact from plan changes on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Mining and Technology (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked 76th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, placing it among mid-to-upper tier 211 institutions, which also attracts liberal arts candidates. Its 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is average; no historical admission anomalies indicate a break in demand. The university is primarily engineering-focused, and its liberal arts majors (Administrative Management, English) lack corresponding A-level discipline evaluations, indicating these are not its traditional strengths.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Administrative Management is stable; English (foreign language) has average social popularity with a wait-and-see attitude. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province is 377,900, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025, with an estimated 148,900 in the history category, intensifying competition. The university is located in Beijing, which has some regional appeal for liberal arts candidates from the southwest.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 3286, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a significant increase of about 32% in provincial candidates intensifying competition, and the fact that liberal arts majors are not the university's strengths, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is approximately 3316, with a range of 2816–3816. The increase in candidates is the main driver for a slight backward shift in ranking, but the unchanged plan limits the fluctuation range.
